In a large bowl, stir together the all-purpose flour, and  whole wheat flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt and 2 Tbsp of the cheese In  small skillet, heat 1 Tbsp of the oil over moderate heat.  Add the basil and  cook for 1 minutes; transfer to a small bowl and cool slightly.
Stir in the  yogurt, milk, and remaining 1 Tbsp of oil.
Add the basil mixture to the dry  ingredients and stir until just combined.
Place the dough on a well-floured  surface.  Using a lightly floured rolling pin, roll out the dough until 1/2\
biscuit cutter or glass, cut out rounds, gently rerolling the scraps, to form 12 biscuits.
Place the biscuits on an ungreased baking  sheet, spacing them 1\

title: Peachy Cobbler
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375F.
Place the peaches in a shallow casserole dish and  sprinkle with lemon juice. In a bowl, combine the flour, sugar and cinnamon.
Cut in the margarine with a pastry blender or a fork until the mixture is crumbly.
Spread mixture over peaches.
Bake for about 30 minutes.

title: Chaat Masala
instructions: Toast and grind cumin and fennel seeds and combine with remaining ingredients.

title: Pear and Ginger Strudel
instructions: Prepare the filling first.  Melt first measure of butter.
Add lemon rind and juice, almonds, ginger and sugar.
Peel and finely slice pears.
Add to butter mixture and stir gently so that the pear pieces are coated with mixture.  Set aside.  Melt the second measure of butter.
Combine ground almonds and ginger.
Remove filo pastry from packet.  Place on a flat surface and cover with plastic wrap so the pastry doesn't dry out.  Line a baking tray with baking paper.
Take the first sheet of filo and place it on the tray.

Brush pastry with melted butter and sprinkle with some ground almond mixture.  Lay another sheet of pastry on top of the first, brush with butter and sprinkle with ground almond mixture.  Continue using all the pastry sheets and all the ground almond mixture.  On the last sheet of pastry brush butter around edge of pastry in a 4cm-wide strip.
Position prepared pastry on baking tray so that you have one of the shorter borders near you.
Place the pear filling on the pastry keeping the mixture 4cm from the sides.
Cover about two-thirds of pastry with pear filling.
Fold over the pastry at the end near you; then turn in the sides.
Roll the strudel away from you, enclosing the filling.
Try and end with the of the pastry underneath.
(Do not roll too tightly as the strudel may burst while cooking.)  Brush with a little more melted butter.
Sprinkle the top with sliced almonds and brush with butter again.
Bake at 180 C for 30 - 35 minutes or until golden brown.
If pastry starts to dry out during cooking, brush once more with butter.
Allow to cool 10 minutes on the baking tray before sliding onto a serving plate.  Serve hot or cold, dusted with icing sugar and whipped cream.

(Paulines Notes:---Use a serrated knife to slice the strudel with a gentle saw movement to avoid crumbling the cooked pastry.  Assembling the strudel on the baking tray saves moving the strudel from the bench to the baking tray which can be difficult.  Filo pastry will keep for weeks in the refrigerator.  Make sure the plastic bag that it is in is well sealed.).

title: Jalapeno Pepper Poppers
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine cheeses, bacon and seasonings.; mix well.
Spoon about  2 Tbs. into each pepper half.
Roll in bread crumbs.
Place in a greased 15x10x1\

title: Peppered Chicken With Creamy Sauce
instructions: Combine butter and garlic in a small bowl, cook on HIGH for about 30 seconds or until butter is melted.
Brush the chicken with this mixture, then toss in peppercorns.
Place chicken in a single layer in a shallow dish.
Cook on HIGH for 3 minutes, turning the chicken during the cooking time. Melt extra butter in a small bowl on HIGH about 30 seconds, stir in flour, stock cube, cream, wine and marsala.

Pour over the chicken, cook on HIGH about 6 minutes or until sauce boils and thickens and the chicken is tender; turn chicken and stir sauce several during cooking time. Cheers,  Doreen Doreen Randal,  Wanganui.
New Zealand.

title: Pina Colada Tart
instructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
In medium bowl, stir together flour, brown sugar and salt. With pastry blender, cut in butter until mixture resembles coarse meal.
With fork, stir in cream and vanilla just until mixture begins to hold together.
With hands, gently squeeze dough into loose clumps.
Place on large sheet of plastic wrap; press clumps together to form a ball.

Using the plastic wrap to keep edges from crumbling, roll into a 12-inch circle. Gently lift dough onto a 9-inch tart pan with removable bottom; fold edges over to make sides double thick, and press dough firmly into corners of pan.
Line pastry with foil; fill with dry beans or pie weights.
Place tart pan on baking sheet or pizza pan; bake 35 minutes.
Turn off oven; carefully remove foil and beans.
Use a fork to pierce pastry in 2 or 3 places; return to turned-off oven for 5 minutes.
Let cool completely.
In medium bowl, beat cream cheese with powdered sugar until smooth;.
Beat in yogurt, extract and rum.
Fill cooled pastry shell; chill.
Drain pineapple well on paper towels; chill.
Just before serving, garnish tart with pineapple and toasted coconut.

title: Bavarian Cream
instructions: Combine sugar, flour, cornstarch and salt. Gradually stir in milk.
On med-high heat (turning down to med, if necessary), cook and stir until mixture thickens and boils.
Cook and stir 2-3 minute.
Stir a little of the hot mixture into egg yolk.
Stir egg mixture into the rest of the hot mixture and bring it just to boiling.
STIRRING CONSTANTLY.
Add vanilla.
cover entire surface with plastic wrap or waxed paper.
Cool.
beat smooth.
Fold in whipped cream.

title: Taco's met kabeljauwbites en mangosalso

snufjes zout en peper naar smaak

instructions:
Snijd de mango in kleine blokjes en doe deze in een kom. Voeg fijngesneden rode ui, limoensap en eventueel wat verse koriander toe. Breng op smaak met een snufje zout en peper en meng alles goed door elkaar. Zet de salsa even apart zodat de smaken kunnen intrekken.

Meng mayonaise met chipotle saus of chipotle kruiden naar smaak. Voeg eventueel een klein beetje limoensap toe voor frisheid. Roer dit goed door tot een gladde saus. Dit is de saus die in het originele recept vaak “ineens verschijnt”.

Snijd de kabeljauw in hapklare stukjes. Bestrooi de vis met zout, peper en eventueel paprikapoeder of andere kruiden naar smaak. Bak de stukjes vis in een pan met een beetje olie in enkele minuten goudbruin en gaar.
Snijd de kabeljauw in hapklare stukjes. Bestrooi de vis met zout, peper en eventueel paprikapoeder of andere kruiden naar smaak. Bak de stukjes vis in een pan met een beetje olie in enkele minuten goudbruin en gaar.

Vul de taco’s eerst met de gebakken kabeljauw. Voeg daarna de mango­salsa en de avocado toe. Maak het af met een lepel chipotle‑mayonaise.

titleEn: Tacos with cod bites and mango salsa

ingredientsEn.name: pinches of salt and pepper to taste
pinches of salt and pepper to taste

instructionsEn: Cut the mango into small cubes and place them in a bowl. Add finely chopped red onion, lime juice and, if desired, some fresh coriander. Season with a pinch of salt and pepper and mix everything well. Set the salsa aside for a while so the flavours can meld.

Cut the mango into small cubes and place them in a bowl. Add finely chopped red onion, lime juice and, if desired, some fresh coriander. Season with a pinch of salt and pepper and mix everything well. Set the salsa aside for a while so the flavours can meld.

Cut the avocado into pieces and roughly mash it in a bowl, or cut it into cubes if you prefer more texture. Mix with a little lime juice, salt and pepper. This prevents discolouration and adds extra flavour.

Cut the avocado into pieces and roughly mash it in a bowl, or cut it into cubes if you prefer more texture. Mix with a little lime juice, salt and pepper. This prevents discolouration and adds extra flavour.

Mix mayonnaise with chipotle sauce or chipotle seasoning to taste. Optionally add a little lime juice for brightness. Stir well until smooth. This is the sauce that often 'appears out of nowhere' in the original recipe.

Mix mayonnaise with chipotle sauce or chipotle seasoning to taste. Optionally add a little lime juice for brightness. Stir well until smooth. This is the sauce that often 'appears out of nowhere' in the original recipe.

Cut the cod into bite-sized pieces. Season the fish with salt, pepper and, if you like, paprika powder or other seasonings. Fry the pieces of fish in a pan with a little oil for a few minutes until golden and cooked through.

Cut the cod into bite-sized pieces. Season the fish with salt, pepper and, if you like, paprika powder or other seasonings. Fry the pieces of fish in a pan with a little oil for a few minutes until golden and cooked through.
Warm the tortillas according to the package instructions, for example briefly in the oven or in a dry frying pan.

Fill the tortillas first with the fried cod. Then add the mango salsa and the avocado. Finish with a spoonful of chipotle mayonnaise.

title: Gnocchi met paprika-tomatensaus en gebakken zalm
instructions: Kook de gnocchi volgens de aanwijzingen op de verpakking. Giet af, spoel af en laat goed uitlekken.
Kook de gnocchi volgens de aanwijzingen op de verpakking. Giet af, spoel af en laat goed uitlekken.

titleEn: Gnocchi with roasted pepper and tomato sauce and pan-fried salmon
instructionsEn: Cook the gnocchi according to the instructions on the packet. Drain, rinse and let drain well.
Cook the gnocchi according to the instructions on the packet. Drain, rinse and let drain well.

Cut the cherry tomatoes in half.
Cut the cherry tomatoes in half.
Cut the cherry tomatoes in half.
Heat a drizzle of olive oil in a sauté pan and fry the cherry tomatoes until they soften. Optionally add some torn thyme and season with salt and pepper.
Heat a drizzle of olive oil in a sauté pan and fry the cherry tomatoes until they soften. Optionally add some torn thyme and season with salt and pepper.
Heat a drizzle of olive oil in a sauté pan and fry the cherry tomatoes until they soften. Optionally add some torn thyme and season with salt and pepper.
Add the washed spinach and toss until it begins to wilt.
Add the washed spinach and toss until it begins to wilt.
Add the washed spinach and toss until it begins to wilt.
Stir in Jumbo's roasted pepper and tomato. Heat through well and then add the drained gnocchi. Season with salt and pepper if needed.
Stir in Jumbo's roasted pepper and tomato. Heat through well and then add the drained gnocchi. Season with salt and pepper if needed.
Stir in Jumbo's roasted pepper and tomato. Heat through well and then add the drained gnocchi. Season with salt and pepper if needed.

Meanwhile, heat a drizzle of olive oil in a non-stick frying pan and cook the salmon fillets skin-side down until the skin is crisp, about 4 minutes. Season with salt and pepper. Turn and cook on the flesh side for about 4 minutes. The salmon fillets should be just cooked.

Meanwhile, heat a drizzle of olive oil in a non-stick frying pan and cook the salmon fillets skin-side down until the skin is crisp, about 4 minutes. Season with salt and pepper. Turn and cook on the flesh side for about 4 minutes. The salmon fillets should be just cooked.

Meanwhile, heat a drizzle of olive oil in a non-stick frying pan and cook the salmon fillets skin-side down until the skin is crisp, about 4 minutes. Season with salt and pepper. Turn and cook on the flesh side for about 4 minutes. The salmon fillets should be just cooked.
Plate the gnocchi with the tomatoes and spinach in deep plates and place the pan-fried salmon fillet on top.
Plate the gnocchi with the tomatoes and spinach in deep plates and place the pan-fried salmon fillet on top.
Plate the gnocchi with the tomatoes and spinach in deep plates and place the pan-fried salmon fillet on top.

title: Roti ayam kecap van Lonny
instructions: Verwarm de roti volgens de aanwijzingen op de verpakking.
Verhit de olie in een wok. Bak de kipreepjes in 4 min. bruin en gaar. Voeg de Kecap Saus toe en verwarm nog 1-2 min.; voeg eventueel een scheutje water toe.
Halveer de roti’s. Vul ze met de kipreepjes een beetje sla, tomaat en komkommer. Leg de roti’s op een schaal of op borden.
Serveer de rest van de sla, komkommer en tomaat er apart bij. Lekker met yoghurtdressing. Selamat Makan!
titleEn: Kecap chicken roti by Lonny
instructionsEn: Heat the roti according to the instructions on the packaging.
Heat the oil in a wok. Fry the chicken strips in 4 min. until browned and cooked through. Add the kecap sauce and heat for another 1-2 min.; add a splash of water if necessary.
Cut the rotis in half. Fill them with the chicken strips and a little lettuce, tomato and cucumber. Place the rotis on a platter or on plates.
Serve the remaining lettuce, cucumber and tomato on the side. Delicious with yoghurt dressing. Enjoy your meal!

title: Nasi met broccoli en vegetarisch gehakt
instructions: Kook de rijst volgens de aanwijzingen op de verpakking. Kook de broccoliroosjes 5 min. in water.
Verhit in de wok de olie. Bak het gehakt 4 min. al omscheppend. Voeg de nasigroenten toe en bak nog 3 min.
Voeg de komijn toe en bak het gehakt met de groenten 1 min. op hoog vuur.
Giet de rijst en broccoli af en laat goed uitlekken. Schep de rijst en broccoli door de groenten en bak de nasi nog 1-2 min. op hoog vuur.
titleEn: Nasi with broccoli and vegetarian mince
instructionsEn: Cook the rice according to the instructions on the packaging. Cook the broccoli florets in water for 5 min.
Heat the oil in the wok. Fry the mince, stirring, for 4 min. Add the nasi vegetables and fry for another 3 min.
Add the cumin and fry the mince with the vegetables on high heat for 1 min.
Drain the rice and broccoli well. Stir the rice and broccoli through the vegetables and fry the nasi for another 1-2 min. on high heat.

title: Salade niçoise met tonijn, tapenade en ei

ingredients.name: zwart-olijventapenade (potje 130 g) of tapenade naar keuze

instructions: Kook de eieren in 7 min. bijna hard. Kook de sperziebonen 5 min. Pel de eieren en halveer ze. Giet de sperziebonen af in een zeef en laat uitlekken.
Schep de sperziebonen in de schaal om met de tapenade en peper naar smaak. Verdeel er de tonijn, tomaatjes, eieren en ansjovis over. Bestrooi de salade met de peterselie.
Bewaar de salade tot gebruik afgedekt in de koelkast. Serveer met het stokbrood.
titleEn: Niçoise salad with tuna, tapenade and egg

ingredientsEn.name: black olive tapenade (jar 130 g) or tapenade of your choice
tuna pieces in olive oil (160 g)

instructionsEn: Cook the eggs in 7 min. until almost hard. Cook the green beans for 5 min. Peel the eggs and halve them. Drain the green beans in a sieve and leave to drain.
Toss the green beans in the bowl with the tapenade and pepper to taste. Scatter the tuna, tomatoes, eggs and anchovies over it. Sprinkle the salad with the parsley.
Keep the salad covered in the fridge until use. Serve with the baguette.

title: Hazenrugfilet met parmaham en rucolastamppot
instructions: Verdeel de hazenrugfilet in 4 porties. Bestrooi het vlees met zout en peper en leg op elke portie 2 blaadjes salie. Omwikkel het vlees met de parmaham. Steek de ham eventueel vast met een cocktailprikker.
Kook de aardappelen in water met zout in 20 min. gaar. Rooster in een droge koekenpan de pijnboompitten goudbruin en schud op een bord.
Verhit in een koekenpan 3 el olijfolie. Bak de hazenrugfilets in 6-8 min. bruin en vanbinnen rosé of naar wens gaar. Laat het vlees in aluminiumfolie 5 min. rusten.

Giet de aardappelen af. Stamp ze met de crème fraîche en de laatste 2 el olijfolie tot een smeuïge stamppot. Schep de rucola en de pijnboompitten erdoor. Breng de stamppot op smaak met peper en weinig zout.
Schep de rucolastamppot op 4 borden. Leg de hazenrugfilet erbij. Lekker met bramensaus.
titleEn: Hare saddle fillet with Parma ham and rocket mash
instructionsEn: Divide the hare saddle fillet into 4 portions. Season the meat with salt and pepper and place 2 sage leaves on each portion. Wrap the meat in the Parma ham. If necessary, secure the ham with a cocktail stick.
Cook the potatoes in salted water for 20 min. until tender. In a dry frying pan, toast the pine nuts until golden brown and tip them onto a plate.
Heat 3 el olive oil in a frying pan. Fry the hare saddle fillets for 6-8 min. until browned and pink in the middle or cooked to taste. Let the meat rest in aluminium foil for 5 min.
Drain the potatoes. Mash them with the Crème Fraîche and the last 2 el olive oil until you have a creamy mash. Fold in the rocket and the pine nuts. Season the mash with pepper and a little salt.
Spoon the rocket mash onto 4 plates. Place the hare saddle fillet alongside. Serve with blackberry sauce.

title: Snelle kipwok met paksoi
instructions: Meng de sesamolie met de helft van de chilisaus. Schep er de kipfiletstukjes door en laat 30 min. marineren.
Verhit de wokolie in een wok. Bak de gemarineerde kipreepjes al omscheppend 1 min.

Voeg de ui en de paprika toe en bak nog 1 min. Voeg tenslotte de paksoistelen en de Chinese kool toe en roerbak weer 1 min. Schep de resterende chilisaus en het paksoigroen erdoor en verwarm de kipwok nog 2-3 min. tot de kip gaar en de groenten beetgaar zijn. Lekker met gekookte witte rijst.
titleEn: Quick chicken stir-fry with pak choi
instructionsEn: Mix the sesame oil with half of the sweet chilli sauce. Toss the chicken breast pieces in it and leave to marinate for 30 min.
Heat the wok oil in a wok. Stir-fry the marinated chicken strips for 1 min, tossing them as you cook.

Add the onion and red pepper and cook for another 1 min. Finally add the pak choi stems and the Chinese cabbage and stir-fry for another 1 min. Stir in the remaining sweet chilli sauce and the pak choi leaves and heat the chicken stir-fry for another 2-3 min until the chicken is cooked through and the vegetables are crisp-tender. Serve with boiled white rice.

title: Varkensrollade met zuurkool en paddenstoelensaus
instructions: Breng voor de aardappelen een pan water aan de kook. Verwijder voorzichtig het net van de rollade en zet het vlees op gelijke afstand vast met cocktailprikkers. Snijd het vlees langs de cocktailprikkers in 8 plakken. Hak de bladselderij fijn.
Kook de aardappelen in 12 min. gaar. Verhit in een hapjespan 25 g boter. Fruit de bladselderij 1 min. op laag vuur. Schep er de zuurkool door en smoor afgedekt in 10-12 min. gaar.
Verhit in een koekenpan 25 g boter. Bak de plakken rollade (evt. in twee porties) in 10 min. aan beide kanten bruin en gaar.

Maak intussen de paddenstoelen schoon en snijd ze in plakjes. Snipper de sjalot. Verhit in een pan de rest van de boter en fruit de sjalot. Voeg de paddenstoelen toe en bak 4 min. mee. Ris de blaadjes van het takje tijm en bak kort mee. Voeg de kookroom en het bouillonblokje toe en laat 2 min. op laag vuur koken. Snijd de bieslook fijn. Breng de paddenstoelensaus op smaak met bieslook (houd iets apart voor de garnering) en (versgemalen) peper.

Giet de aardappelen af en vang een kopje kookvocht op. Stamp tot een smeuïge puree. Voeg eventueel wat kookvocht toe. Schep de zuurkool met het stoofvocht door de puree. Breng op smaak met (versgemalen) peper

Verdeel de zuurkoolpuree over 4 borden. Leg een plak rollade op de puree en schep er de paddenstoelensaus over. Garneer met de achtergehouden bieslook. Serveer er de rest van de rollade en saus apart bij.
titleEn: Pork roulade with sauerkraut and mushroom sauce
instructionsEn: Bring a pan of water to the boil for the potatoes. Carefully remove the net from the roulade and secure the meat at equal intervals with cocktail sticks. Cut the meat along the cocktail sticks into 8 plakken. Finely chop the leaf celery.
Cook the potatoes in 12 min. until tender. Heat 25 g butter in a sauté pan. Sweat the leaf celery for 1 min. over low heat. Stir in the sauerkraut and braise covered for 10-12 min. until cooked.
Heat 25 g butter in a frying pan. Fry the roulade slices (if necessary in two batches) for 10 min. until brown and cooked on both sides.

Meanwhile clean the mushrooms and slice them. Finely chop the shallot. Heat the rest of the butter in a pan and sweat the shallot. Add the mushrooms and fry for 4 min. Pick the leaves from the sprig of thyme and briefly fry together. Add the cooking cream and the stock cube and let simmer for 2 min. over low heat. Finely chop the chives. Season the mushroom sauce with chives (reserve a little for garnish) and (freshly ground) pepper.

Drain the potatoes and reserve een kopje cooking liquid. Mash to a smooth puree. Add some cooking liquid if necessary. Fold the sauerkraut with its braising liquid through the mash. Season to taste with (freshly ground) pepper
Divide the sauerkraut mash over 4 borden. Place a slice of roulade on the mash and spoon the mushroom sauce over. Garnish with the reserved chives. Serve the remaining roulade and sauce separately.

title: Pompoenhutspot crumble
instructions: Verwarm de oven voor tot 220 °C. Breng een pan water voor de aardappelen aan de kook. Verhit in een koekenpan 25 g boter en fruit de ui uit de zak hutspotgroenten in 3 min. glazig.

Kook de aardappelen in 12 min. gaar. Voeg intussen het gehakt toe aan de ui en ris de blaadjes van 2 takjes tijm boven de pan. Bak het gehakt in 5 min. bruin en gaar. Breng op smaak met versgemalen peper. Schep het gehakt in de ovenschaal.

Verhit opnieuw 25 g boter in de koekenpan en bak de pompoen met de wortel 5 min. Ris de blaadjes van 3 takjes tijm boven de pan en schep om. Stoof de pompoen in 5 min. gaar met het deksel op de pan. Rasp intussen de kaas boven een kom.

Meng de geraspte kaas met de bloem en versgemalen peper. Kneed er met de vingertoppen van koude handen de rest van de boter door, tot een kruimeldeeg ontstaat. Zet tot gebruik afgedekt in de koelkast.
Schep het pompoen wortelmengsel op het gehakt in de ovenschaal. Giet de aardappelen af en vang een kopje kookvocht op. Stamp de aardappelen met een beetje kookvocht tot een smeuïge puree.
Verdeel de aardappelpuree over de groente in de ovenschaal en bestrooi met het kruimeldeeg. Bak de pompoenhutspot crumble in 10-15 min. goudgeel en knapperig in de voorverwarmde oven.
Garneer met blaadjes tijm.
titleEn: Pumpkin hutspot crumble

ingredientsEn.name: pumpkin mix with carrot and onion

instructionsEn: Preheat the oven to 220 °C. Bring a pan of water for the potatoes to the boil. Heat 25 g butter in a frying pan and soften the onion from the bag of pumpkin mix for 3 minutes until translucent.

Cook the potatoes for 12 minutes until tender. Meanwhile add the minced beef to the onion and strip the leaves from 2 sprigs of thyme over the pan. Fry the beef for 5 minutes until browned and cooked through. Season with freshly ground pepper. Spoon the beef into the baking dish.

Heat another 25 g butter in the frying pan and fry the pumpkin with the carrot for 5 minutes. Strip the leaves from 3 sprigs of thyme over the pan and toss. Simmer the pumpkin for 5 minutes with the lid on the pan until cooked. Meanwhile grate the cheese into a bowl.

Mix the grated cheese with the plain flour and freshly ground pepper. Using the fingertips of cold hands, rub the remaining butter through until a crumbly dough forms. Cover and chill in the fridge until needed.

Spoon the pumpkin and carrot mixture over the beef in the baking dish. Drain the potatoes, reserving a cup of the cooking water. Mash the potatoes with a little of the cooking water until a smooth puree forms.

Spread the mashed potato over the vegetables in the baking dish and sprinkle with the crumbly topping. Bake the pumpkin hutspot crumble in the preheated oven for 10-15 minutes until golden and crispy.
Garnish with thyme leaves.

title: Spinazie-ricottacannelloni met 2 kazen
instructions: Verwarm de oven voor tot 200 ºC. Snipper de ui en hak de knoflook fijn. Verhit in een hapjespan 2 el olie. Fruit de ui en 2/3 van de knoflook 1 min. Voeg de spinazie in porties toe en laat het blad al omscheppend slinken en het vocht verdampen.
Pureer intussen met de staafmixer de tomaten met de rest van de knoflook en 1 el olie. Breng de tomatensaus in een pan aan de kook en laat 5 min. zachtjes koken.

Doe de ricotta in een kom. Schep er de spinazie (zonder vocht) door en breng op smaak met peper. Leg de lasagnebladen op een schoon werkblad. Verdeel de spinazievulling in een baan, in de lengte over de lasagnebladen. Rol de lasagnebladen strak op tot cannelloni.

Schenk een laagje tomatensaus in de ovenschaal. Leg de cannelloni in de tomatensaus. Schenk er de rest van de tomatensaus over. Verdeel de mozzarella en gorgonzola in stukjes en verdeel ze over de tomatensaus.
Bak de cannelloni in de voorverwarmde oven in 25 min. goudgeel en gaar.
titleEn: Spinach ricotta cannelloni with 2 cheeses
instructionsEn: Preheat the oven to 200 ºC. Finely chop the onion and garlic. Heat 2 el oil in a sauté pan. Fry the onion and 2/3 of the garlic for 1 min. Add the spinach in batches and, stirring, allow the leaves to wilt and the liquid to evaporate.
Meanwhile, puree the tomatoes with the remaining garlic and 1 el oil using the hand blender. Bring the tomato sauce to the boil in a pan and let it simmer for 5 min.

Put the ricotta in a bowl. Fold the spinach (without any liquid) through it and season with pepper. Lay the lasagne sheets on a clean work surface. Spread the spinach filling in a long strip down the length of the lasagne sheets. Roll the lasagne sheets tightly up into cannelloni.

Pour a layer of tomato sauce into the baking dish. Place the cannelloni in the tomato sauce. Pour the rest of the tomato sauce over them. Break the mozzarella and gorgonzola into pieces and distribute them over the tomato sauce.
Bake the cannelloni in the preheated oven for 25 min. until golden and cooked through.

title: Andijviestamppot met rode biet
instructions: Doe de aardappelen in een pan met water, breng aan de kook en kook in 12 min. gaar.

Snipper intussen de uien. Verhit 2 el olie in een hapjespan en fruit de ui 5 min. op laag vuur. Snijd de bietjes in blokjes van 2 cm. Voeg de biet, tijm en 2 el balsamicoazijn toe aan de ui en bak 5 min. met de deksel op de pan. Schep halverwege om en breng op smaak met peper.

Hak de amandelen grof en verkruimel de feta. Houd een kopje kookvocht van de aardappelen apart. Giet de aardappelen af, doe terug in de pan en stamp met kookvocht tot een smeuïge puree. Schep de andijvie er in delen door en laat slinken. Schep er de helft van de feta door en breng op smaak met peper.
Verdeel de stamppot over 4 borden en schep er de bietjes op. Strooi er de amandelen over en garneer met de rest van de feta.
titleEn: Endive mashed potatoes with beetroot
instructionsEn: Put the potatoes in a pan with water, bring to the boil and cook in 12 min. until tender.

Meanwhile, finely chop the onions. Heat 2 el oil in a large frying pan and gently fry the onion for 5 min. over low heat. Cut the beetroot into 2 cm cubes. Add the beetroot, thyme and 2 el balsamic vinegar to the onion and cook for 5 min. with the lid on. Stir halfway through and season with pepper.

Roughly chop the almonds and crumble the feta. Set aside a cup of the potato cooking water. Drain the potatoes, return them to the pan and mash with some cooking water until you have a smooth puree. Fold the endive in in batches and let it wilt. Stir through half the feta and season with pepper.
Divide the mashed potatoes among 4 plates and spoon the beetroot on top. Scatter the almonds over and garnish with the remaining feta.

title: Eenpans-bolognese
instructions: Verwijder het vel van de saucijzen. Verhit de olie in een ruime hapjespan met antiaanbaklaag, voeg het vlees toe, breek met een houten lepel in kleine stukjes en bak rul.
Snijd intussen de bleekselderij in halve maantjes. Voeg de selderij samen met de hutspotgroenten toe en bak 5 min. al omscheppend.
Schenk er de frito bij en roer door. Voeg de macaroni en 300 ml water toe. Breng aan de kook, zet het vuur laag en kook de macaroni in 15 min. met het deksel op de pan gaar.
Scheur intussen de mozzarella in kleine stukjes. Breng de pasta op smaak. verdeel over 4 borden en verdeel er de mozzarella over.
titleEn: One-pan bolognese
instructionsEn: Remove the casings from the sausages. Heat the oil in a large non-stick frying pan, add the meat, break it up into small pieces with a wooden spoon and cook until browned and crumbly.
Meanwhile slice the celery into half moons. Add the celery and the stew vegetable mix and cook for 5 minutes, stirring.
Pour in the frito and stir. Add the macaroni and 300 ml water. Bring to the boil, reduce the heat and cook the macaroni for 15 minutes with the lid on the pan.
Meanwhile tear the mozzarella into small pieces. Season the pasta. Divide among 4 plates and scatter the mozzarella over them.

title: Klassieke bami goreng met kip
instructions: Bereid de mie volgens de aanwijzingen op de verpakking.
Verhit 1 el olie in een hapjespan of wok en roerbak de kip in 8 min. gaar.
Voeg de boemboe toe en bak 1 min.
Voeg de groenten en taugé toe en roerbak 5 min. Voeg de laatste minuut de mie toe.
Verhit intussen de rest van de olie in een koekenpan en bak 4 spiegeleieren.
Verdeel de bami over 4 borden en serveer met het spiegelei.
titleEn: Classic bami goreng with chicken
instructionsEn: Prepare the noodles according to the instructions on the packaging.
Heat 1 el oil in a frying pan or wok and stir-fry the chicken for 8 min. until cooked through.
Add the bami goreng spice paste and cook for 1 min.
Add the bami and nasi vegetable mix and the bean sprouts and stir-fry for 5 min. Add the noodles in the last minute.
Meanwhile heat the remaining oil in a frying pan and make 4 fried eggs.
Divide the bami among 4 plates and serve with the fried egg.

title: Tteokbokki
instructions: Breng een grote pan met water aan de kook.
Kook de rijststicks 2 minuten en giet het water af.
Meng de gochujangpasta, de chili-vlokken en suiker in een kom.
Doe de saus in een verwarmde pan, voeg daarna de rijststicks en lente-uien toe.
Roer voorzichtig tot het mengsel begint te koken, draai het vuur vervolgens naar middenlaag.
Blijf roeren tot de rijststicks zacht zijn geworden en de saus is ingedikt. Dit duurt 10 à 15 minuten.
Voeg de hardgekookte eieren toe en laat ze 1 minuut meekoken.
Serveer dit warm.
titleEn: Tteokbokki
instructionsEn: Bring a large pan of water to the boil.
Boil the rice sticks for 2 minutes and drain the water.
Mix the gochujang paste, the chilli flakes and sugar in a bowl.
Put the sauce into a heated pan, then add the rice sticks and spring onions.
Stir gently until the mixture starts to boil, then turn the heat to medium.
Keep stirring until the rice sticks have softened and the sauce has thickened. This takes 10 to 15 minutes.
Add the hard-boiled eggs and let them cook for 1 minute.
Serve this warm.

title: Slowcooker rundvlees en broccoli
instructions: Roer in een middelgrote kom de runderbouillon, sojasaus, oestersaus, suiker, sesamolie en knoflook door elkaar.
Plaats rundvlees in een slow cooker. Voeg saus mengsel toe en gooi zachtjes om. Deksel op de pan en kook op laag vuur gedurende 90 minuten.
In een kleine kom roer je 1/4 kopje water en maïzena door elkaar.
Roer de maïzena mengsel en broccoli in de slowcooker. Dek af en kook op hoog vuur gedurende 30 minuten.
Dien meteen op.
titleEn: Slowcooker beef and broccoli
instructionsEn: Stir the prepared beef stock, organic soy sauce, oyster sauce, granulated sugar, sesame oil and jumbo garlic together in a medium bowl.
Place the lean beef slices in a slow cooker. Add the sauce mixture and toss gently. Cover and cook on low for 90 minuten.
In a small bowl stir 1/4 kopje water and cornflour together.
Stir the cornflour mixture and broccoli into the slow cooker. Cover and cook on high for 30 minuten.
Serve immediately.

title: Ovenschotel stampot zuurkool met gehakt spekjes en kaas
instructions: Kook de aardappelen gaar in kokend water met een bouillonblokje.
Kook de zuurkool volgens de verpakking in een pan met witte wijn en een beetje water.
Hak het uitje en knoflook samen met het pepertje fijn met behulp van een staafmixer.
Fruit het ui, knoflook en pepermengsel in een koekenpan en bak daarna de spekjes en het gehakt rul. Voeg wat versgemalen peper en zout toe.
Verwarm de oven voor op 200 graden.
Pureer de aardappelen met de melk en voeg wat versgemalen peper toe. Voeg de zuurkool bij de puree en mix alles door elkaar.
Doe eerst een laagje zuurkoolstampot in de ovenschaal en leg hierop een laagje gehakt. Ga door tot alles op is.
Strooi paneermeel over de top en leg er wat plakjes boter op. Strooi vervolgens wat oude kaas over de bovenkant.
Bak het geheel in de oven totdat de kaas gesmolten en goudbruin is.
Eet smakelijk!
titleEn: Baked mashed potato and sauerkraut casserole with minced beef, bacon lardons and cheese
instructionsEn: Cook the potatoes until tender in boiling water with a beef stock cube.
Cook the sauerkraut according to the package directions in a pan with dry white wine and a little water.
Finely chop the onion and garlic together with the chilli using a hand blender.
Sauté the onion, garlic and chilli mixture in a frying pan, then fry the bacon lardons and minced beef until the mince is browned and crumbly. Add some freshly ground pepper and salt.
Preheat the oven to 200 degrees.
Mash the potatoes with the milk and add some freshly ground pepper. Add the sauerkraut to the mash and mix everything together.
Put a layer of sauerkraut stamppot into the casserole dish and place a layer of minced beef on top. Continue layering until everything is used up.
Sprinkle breadcrumbs over the top and place some slices of butter on top. Then sprinkle some mature cheese over the surface.
Bake the whole dish in the oven until the cheese has melted and is golden brown.
Enjoy your meal!

title: Aardappelen met tuinbonen
instructions: Was de aardappelen en snijd ze in stukken die ongeveer net zo groot zijn als de tuinbonen en kook de aardappels 8 minuten in een flinke bodem water met zout.
Maak de reuzel warm. Bak daarin het spek langzaam uit en fruit er daarna de ui in.
Was de verse bonen en kook ze met weinig water en wat zout bijna gaar. Kook de bonen uit de diepvries niet helemaal gaar volgens de aanwijzing op de verpakking.
Giet de aardappels af en laat ze drogen. Vermeng de bloem met bonenkruid of kerrie, aroma, peper en zout en rol de tuinbonen daardoor.
Schud de rest van de bloem door de aardappelen. Maak in een grote koekenpan de boter warm en bak daarin de aardappelen en de tuinbonen verder gaar en mooi van kleur.
Bak op het laatste ogenblik de ham met spek en uien nog even mee. Dien het gerecht warm op.
titleEn: Potatoes with broad beans
instructionsEn: Wash the potatoes and cut them into pieces about the same size as the broad beans and cook the potatoes for 8 minutes in a generous amount of salted water.
Warm the pork lard. Slowly fry the bacon in it and then gently fry the onions.
If using fresh broad beans, wash them and cook them with a little water and some salt until almost tender. Do not cook frozen broad beans completely; follow the instructions on the packet.
Drain the potatoes and let them dry. Mix the flour with summer savoury or curry, Aromat, pepper and salt and coat the broad beans in this mixture.
Toss the remaining flour through the potatoes. Heat the butter in a large frying pan and fry the potatoes and broad beans until cooked through and nicely browned.
At the last moment, briefly fry the diced ham with the bacon and onions. Serve the dish warm.

title: Ketjap boontjes
instructions: Maak de boontjes schoon, snijd ze en kook ze ongeveer 5 minuten voor.
Snijd de uien in ringen.
Verwarm olie in de wok en fruit de uien in de olie. Voeg knoflookpoeder toe.
Bak na ongeveer 2 minuten de spekreepjes en ketjap al omscheppend tot de spekreepjes krokant zijn (ongeveer 4 minuten).
Voeg de boontjes en bonenkruid toe en bak nog even door. Voeg als laatste de tauge toe.
titleEn: Green beans with sweet soy sauce
instructionsEn: Trim the green beans, cut them and parboil them for about 5 minutes.
Slice the onions into rings.
Heat the olive oil in a wok and gently fry the onions. Add the garlic powder.
After about 2 minutes add the bacon lardons and sweet soy sauce, stirring, and fry until the bacon is crispy (about 4 minutes).
Add the green beans and summer savoury and cook briefly. Finally add the bean sprouts.

title: Ovenschotel broccoli met champignons gedroogde tomaten en spekreepjes
instructions: Kook de aardappelen gaar in water met wat zout. Laat de gare aardappelen goed droogstomen.

Voeg de roomboter en de warme melk bij de aardappelen. Stamp de aardappelen fijn met een aardappelstamper of mix de aardappelen met een gewone mixer (geen staafmixer!). Breng op smaak met peper en zout.

Maak de broccoli schoon en verdeel de broccoli in kleine roosjes. Verhit de olie in de wok en bak hierin de spekreepjes knapperig en bruin. Voeg de ui- en knoflooksnippers toe en bak ze even mee tot glazig. Voeg de plakjes champignons toe en bak die ook even mee. Doe de broccoli-roosjes erbij en schep alles goed door elkaar.
Doe ½ dl kippenbouillon (van tablet) bij de broccoli. Zet de deksel op de wok en laat de broccoli in plm. 5 – 7 minuten (afhankelijk van de grootte van de roosjes) beetgaar worden.

Roer de reepjes gedroogde tomaten door de broccoli. Meng de broccoli door de aardappelpuree en doe het geheel in een vuurvaste schaal. Of doe de broccoli eerst in een vuurvaste schaal en verdeel de puree erover. Strooi de geraspte kaas over de schotel.
Zet de schotel plm. 30 – 45 minuten in het midden van de op 200 graden (boven- en onder-warmte) voorverwarmde oven tot de kaas een goudbruine kleur heeft gekregen.
titleEn: Oven bake broccoli with mushrooms sundried tomatoes and bacon lardons
instructionsEn: Cook the potatoes until tender in water with some salt. Let the cooked potatoes steam dry well.
Add the butter and the warm milk to the potatoes. Mash the potatoes with a potato masher or mix the potatoes with a regular mixer (not a hand blender!). Season with pepper and salt.

Clean the broccoli and divide it into small florets. Heat the oil in the wok and fry the bacon lardons here until crisp and brown. Add the shallot and garlic slices and fry them briefly until translucent. Add the sliced mushrooms and fry those briefly as well. Add the broccoli florets and toss everything together well.
Add ½ dl chicken stock (from cube) to the broccoli. Put the lid on the wok and let the broccoli become al dente in plm. 5 - 7 minuten (depending on the size of the florets).

Stir the strips of sundried tomatoes through the broccoli. Mix the broccoli into the mashed potatoes and put the whole into an ovenproof dish. Or put the broccoli in an ovenproof dish first and spread the mash over it. Sprinkle the grated cheese over the dish.
Place the dish in the middle of the oven preheated to 200 graden (boven- en onder-warmte) for plm. 30 - 45 minuten until the cheese has turned golden brown.

title: Griekse kofta
instructions: Meng het gehakt met de helft van de kruiden (komijn, tijm, knoflook, oregano, kaneel, laurierpoeder). Rol gehaktballetjes van ongeveer 2x de maat van een soepballetje en bak ze op zacht vuur aan tot ze stevig zijn, dan verder laten garen.

Snij de ui (niet te fijn) Even aanbakken in een beetje olijfolie. Gebruik je verse knoflook, voeg die dan nu toe. Snij de courgette in blokjes en bak deze mee tot de blokjes een beetje zacht zijn. Doe de inhoud van het blik tomaten erbij in de pan en laat goed heet worden.

Voeg nu de andere helft van de kruiden en de rest van de ingrediënten toe behalve de maizena. Aan de kook brengen. De saus moet niet te dun zijn. Je kunt hem desgewenst dikker maken met een papje van maizena en een beetje koud water. Dit even mee laten koken.
Voeg de saus toe aan de gehaktballetjes toe en laat het nog een minuut of 20 zachtjes opstaan.

Rasp de komkommer grof en doe het in een zeef of vergiet. Bestrooien met zout en een half uur laten staan. Vervolgens het vocht er goed uit drukken of knijpen. 1 of 2 teentjes knoflook persen en mengen met de yoghurt. Zout en peper naar smaak toevoegen. Als laatste de uitgelekte komkommer toevoegen.
titleEn: Greek kofta
instructionsEn: Mix the minced beef with half of the spices (cumin, thyme, garlic, oregano, cinnamon, ground bay leaf). Roll meatballs about twice the size of a soup meatball and fry them over low heat until they are firm, then continue cooking through.

Slice the onion (not too fine). Lightly fry in a little olive oil. If you are using fresh garlic, add it now. Cut the courgette into cubes and fry them until the cubes are slightly soft. Add the contents of the can of tomatoes to the pan and heat well.

Now add the other half of the spices and the remaining ingredients except the cornflour. Bring to the boil. The sauce should not be too thin. If desired, thicken it with a slurry of cornflour and a little cold water. Let this simmer briefly.
Add the sauce to the meatballs and let it simmer gently for about 20 minutes.

Coarsely grate the cucumber and place it in a sieve or colander. Sprinkle with salt and leave for half an hour. Then squeeze out the liquid well. Press 1 or 2 cloves of garlic and mix with the yoghurt. Add salt and pepper to taste. Finally stir in the drained cucumber.

title: Spaghetti met rucola tomaatjes en pijnboompitten
instructions: Kook de spaghetti volgens de aanwijzing op het pak.
Snij de tomaatjes doormidden en de ui in ringen. Verhit de olie in een grote pan en fruit de uienringen zacht. Schep de tomaatjes erdoor en bak die even mee.
Giet de spaghetti af en schep hem in de groentepan. Maak hem smeuïg met extra vergine olijfolie en kruid het met Italiaanse kruiden, zout en peper. Warm hem nog even door.
Voeg op het laatste moment de rucola en mozzarella toe. Schep het geheel goed door.
Strooi de pijnboompitten over het gerecht op je bord. Geniet ervan!
titleEn: Spaghetti with rocket, cherry tomatoes and pine nuts
instructionsEn: Cook the spaghetti according to the instructions on the packet.
Cut the cherry tomatoes in half and slice the onion into rings. Heat the oil in a large pan and gently fry the onion rings. Stir in the tomatoes and fry them briefly as well.

Drain the spaghetti and add it to the pan with the vegetables. Toss it with extra virgin olive oil to make it silky and season with dried Italian herbs, salt and black pepper. Warm everything through briefly.
At the last moment add the rocket and mozzarella. Toss everything together well.
Sprinkle the pine nuts over the dish on your plate. Enjoy!

title: Garides Saganaki
instructions: Place the prawns in a pot and add enough water to cover. Boil for 5 minutes. Drain, reserving the liquid, and set aside.

Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a saucepan. Add the onion; cook and stir until soft. Mix in the parsley, wine, tomatoes, garlic and remaining olive oil. Simmer, stirring occasionally, for about 30 minutes, or until the sauce is thickened.
While the sauce is simmering, the prawns should become cool enough to handle. First remove the legs by pinching them, and then pull off the shells, leaving the head and tail on.

When the sauce has thickened, stir in the prawns. Bring to a simmer again if the sauce has cooled with the prawns, and cook for about 5 minutes. Add the feta and remove from the heat. Let stand until the cheese starts to melt. Serve warm with slices of crusty bread.
Though completely untraditional, you can add a few tablespoons of stock or passata to this recipe to make a delicious pasta sauce. Toss with pasta after adding the feta, and serve.

title: Chicken Enchilada Casserole
instructions: Cut each chicken breast in about 3 pieces, so that it cooks faster and put it in a small pot. Pour Enchilada sauce over it and cook covered on low to medium heat until chicken is cooked through, about 20 minutes. No water is needed, the chicken will cook in the Enchilada sauce. Make sure you stir occasionally so that it doesn't stick to the bottom.
Remove chicken from the pot and shred with two forks.
Preheat oven to 375 F degrees.

Start layering the casserole. Start with about ¼ cup of the leftover Enchilada sauce over the bottom of a baking dish. I used a longer baking dish, so that I can put 2 corn tortillas across. Place 2 tortillas on the bottom, top with ⅓ of the chicken and ⅓ of the remaining sauce. Sprinkle with ⅓ of the cheese and repeat starting with 2 more tortillas, then chicken, sauce, cheese. Repeat with last layer with the remaining ingredients, tortillas, chicken, sauce and cheese.
Bake for 20 to 30 minutes uncovered, until bubbly and cheese has melted and started to brown on top.
Serve warm.

title: Bakewell tart
instructions: To make the pastry, measure the flour into a bowl and rub in the butter with your fingertips until the mixture resembles fine breadcrumbs. Add the water, mixing to form a soft dough.
Roll out the dough on a lightly floured work surface and use to line a 20cm/8in flan tin. Leave in the fridge to chill for 30 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 200C/400F/Gas 6 (180C fan).
Line the pastry case with foil and fill with baking beans. Bake blind for about 15 minutes, then remove the beans and foil and cook for a further five minutes to dry out the base.
For the filing, spread the base of the flan generously with raspberry jam.
Melt the butter in a pan, take off the heat and then stir in the sugar. Add ground almonds, egg and almond extract. Pour into the flan tin and sprinkle over the flaked almonds.
Bake for about 35 minutes. If the almonds seem to be browning too quickly, cover the tart loosely with foil to prevent them burning.

title: Apple Frangipan Tart
instructions: Preheat the oven to 200C/180C Fan/Gas 6.

Put the biscuits in a large re-sealable freezer bag and bash with a rolling pin into fine crumbs. Melt the butter in a small pan, then add the biscuit crumbs and stir until coated with butter. Tip into the tart tin and, using the back of a spoon, press over the base and sides of the tin to give an even layer. Chill in the fridge while you make the filling.

Cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy. You can do this in a food processor if you have one. Process for 2-3 minutes. Mix in the eggs, then add the ground almonds and almond extract and blend until well combined.

Peel the apples, and cut thin slices of apple. Do this at the last minute to prevent the apple going brown. Arrange the slices over the biscuit base. Spread the frangipane filling evenly on top. Level the surface and sprinkle with the flaked almonds.
Bake for 20-25 minutes until golden-brown and set.
Remove from the oven and leave to cool for 15 minutes. Remove the sides of the tin. An easy way to do this is to stand the tin on a can of beans and push down gently on the edges of the tin.
Transfer the tart, with the tin base attached, to a serving plate. Serve warm with cream, crème fraiche or ice cream.

title: Kapsalon
instructions: Cut the meat into strips. Heat oil in a pan and fry the strips for 6 minutes until it's ready.
Bake the fries until golden brown in a deep fryrer. When ready transfer to a backing dish. Make sure the fries are spread over the whole dish.
Cover the fries with a new layer of meat and spread evenly.
Add a layer of cheese over the meat. You can also use grated cheese. When done put in the oven for a few minutes until the cheese is melted.
Chop the lettuce, tomato and cucumber in small pieces and mix together. for a basic salad. As extra you can add olives jalapenos and a red union.
Dived the salad over the dish and Serve with garlicsauce and hot sauce

title: Spaghetti Bolognese
instructions: Put the onion and oil in a large pan and fry over a fairly high heat for 3-4 mins. Add the garlic and mince and fry until they both brown. Add the mushrooms and herbs, and cook for another couple of mins.
Stir in the tomatoes, beef stock, tomato ketchup or purée, Worcestershire sauce and seasoning. Bring to the boil, then reduce the heat, cover and simmer, stirring occasionally, for 30 mins.

Meanwhile, cook the spaghetti in a large pan of boiling, salted water, according to packet instructions. Drain well, run hot water through it, put it back in the pan and add a dash of olive oil, if you like, then stir in the meat sauce. Serve in hot bowls and hand round Parmesan cheese, for sprinkling on top.

title: Spicy Arrabiata Penne
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Add kosher salt to the boiling water, then add the pasta. Cook according to the package instructions, about 9 minutes.

In a large skillet over medium-high heat, add the olive oil and heat until the oil starts to shimmer. Add the garlic and cook, stirring, until fragrant, 1 to 2 minutes. Add the chopped tomatoes, red chile flakes, Italian seasoning and salt and pepper to taste. Bring to a boil and cook for 5 minutes. Remove from the heat and add the chopped basil.
Drain the pasta and add it to the sauce. Garnish with Parmigiano-Reggiano flakes and more basil and serve warm.

title: Teriyaki Chicken Casserole
instructions: Preheat oven to 350° F. Spray a 9x13-inch baking pan with non-stick spray.
Combine soy sauce, ½ cup water, brown sugar, ginger and garlic in a small saucepan and cover. Bring to a boil over medium heat. Remove lid and cook for one minute once boiling.

Meanwhile, stir together the corn starch and 2 tablespoons of water in a separate dish until smooth. Once sauce is boiling, add mixture to the saucepan and stir to combine. Cook until the sauce starts to thicken then remove from heat.

Place the chicken breasts in the prepared pan. Pour one cup of the sauce over top of chicken. Place chicken in oven and bake 35 minutes or until cooked through. Remove from oven and shred chicken in the dish using two forks.
*Meanwhile, steam or cook the vegetables according to package directions.

Add the cooked vegetables and rice to the casserole dish with the chicken. Add most of the remaining sauce, reserving a bit to drizzle over the top when serving. Gently toss everything together in the casserole dish until combined. Return to oven and cook 15 minutes. Remove from oven and let stand 5 minutes before serving. Drizzle each serving with remaining sauce. Enjoy!

title: Honey Teriyaki Salmon
instructions: Mix all the ingredients in the Honey Teriyaki Glaze together. Whisk to blend well. Combine the salmon and the Glaze together.
Heat up a skillet on medium-low heat. Add the oil, Pan-fry the salmon on both sides until it’s completely cooked inside and the glaze thickens.
Garnish with sesame and serve immediately.

title: Pad See Ew
instructions: Mix Sauce in small bowl.
Mince garlic into wok with oil. Place over high heat, when hot, add chicken and Chinese broccoli stems, cook until chicken is light golden.
Push to the side of the wok, crack egg in and scramble. Don't worry if it sticks to the bottom of the wok - it will char and which adds authentic flavour.
Add noodles, Chinese broccoli leaves and sauce. Gently mix together until the noodles are stained dark and leaves are wilted. Serve immediately!

title: Vegan Lasagna
instructions: 1) Preheat oven to 180 degrees celcius.

2) Boil vegetables for 5-7 minutes, until soft. Add lentils and bring to a gentle simmer, adding a stock cube if desired. Continue cooking and stirring until the lentils are soft, which should take about 20 minutes.
3) Blanch spinach leaves for a few minutes in a pan, before removing and setting aside.
4) Top up the pan with water and cook the lasagne sheets. When cooked, drain and set aside.

5) To make the sauce, melt the butter and add the flour, then gradually add the soya milk along with the mustard and the vinegar. Cook and stir until smooth and then assemble the lasagne as desired in a baking dish.
6) Bake in the preheated oven for about 25 minutes.

title: Chocolate Gateau
instructions: Preheat the oven to 180°C/350°F/Gas Mark 4. Grease and line the base of an 8 in round spring form cake tin with baking parchment
Break the chocolate into a heatproof bowl and place over a saucepan of gently simmering water and stir until it melts. (or melt in the microwave for 2-3 mins stirring occasionally)

Place the butter and sugar in a mixing bowl and cream together with a wooden spoon until light and fluffy. Gradually beat in the eggs, adding a little flour if the mixture begins to curdle. Fold in the remaining flour with the cooled, melted chocolate and milk. Mix until smooth.
Spread the mixture into the cake tin and bake for 50-55 mins or until firm in the centre and a skewer comes out cleanly. Cool for 10 minutes, then turn out and cool completely.

title: Mediterranean Pasta Salad
instructions: Bring a large saucepan of salted water to the boil
Add the pasta, stir once and cook for about 10 minutes or as directed on the packet.
Meanwhile, wash the tomatoes and cut into quarters. Slice the olives. Wash the basil.
Put the tomatoes into a salad bowl and tear the basil leaves over them. Add a tablespoon of olive oil and mix.
When the pasta is ready, drain into a colander and run cold water over it to cool it quickly.
Toss the pasta into the salad bowl with the tomatoes and basil.
Add the sliced olives, drained mozzarella balls, and chunks of tuna. Mix well and let the salad rest for at least half an hour to allow the flavours to mingle.
Sprinkle the pasta with a generous grind of black pepper and drizzle with the remaining olive oil just before serving.

title: Cream Cheese Tart
instructions: Crust: make a dough from 250g flour (I like mixing different flours like plain and wholegrain spelt flour), 125g butter, 1 egg and a pinch of salt, press it into a tart form and place it in the fridge. Filling: stir 300g cream cheese and 100ml milk until smooth, add in 3 eggs, 100g grated parmesan cheese and season with salt, pepper and nutmeg. Take the crust out of the fridge and prick the bottom with a fork. Pour in the filling and bake at 175 degrees C for about 25 minutes. Cover the tart with some aluminium foil after half the time. In the mean time, slice about 350g mini tomatoes. In a small pan heat 3tbsp olive oil, 3tbsp white vinegar, 1 tbsp honey, salt and pepper and combine well. Pour over the tomato slices and mix well. With a spoon, place the tomato slices on the tart, avoiding too much liquid on it. Decorate with basil leaves and enjoy

title: Potato Gratin with Chicken
instructions: 15 minute potato gratin with chicken and bacon greens: a gratin always seems more effort and more indulgent than ordinary boiled or roasts, but it doesn't have to take 45mins, it's nice for a change and you can control the calorie content by going with full fat to low fat creme fraiche. (It's always tastes better full fat though obviously!) to serve 4: use 800g of potatoes, finely slice and boil in a pan for about 5-8 mins till firmish, not soft. Finely slice 3 onions and place in an oven dish with 2 tblsp of olive oil and 100ml of chicken stock. Cook till the onions are soft then drain the potatoes and pour onto the onions. Season and spoon over cream or creme fraiche till all is covered but not swimming. Grate Parmesan over the top then finish under the grill till nicely golden. serve with chicken and bacon, peas and spinach.

title: Irish stew

ingredients.name: soaked overnight in water whole wheat
cut into 3cm cubes lamb loin chops

instructions: Heat the oven to 180C/350F/gas mark 4. Drain and rinse the soaked wheat, put it in a medium pan with lots of water, bring to a boil and simmer for an hour, until cooked. Drain and set aside.

Season the lamb with a teaspoon of salt and some black pepper. Put one tablespoon of oil in a large, deep sauté pan for which you have a lid; place on a medium-high heat. Add some of the lamb – don't overcrowd the pan – and sear for four minutes on all sides. Transfer to a bowl, and repeat with the remaining lamb, adding oil as needed.

Lower the heat to medium and add a tablespoon of oil to the pan. Add the shallots and fry for four minutes, until caramelised. Tip these into the lamb bowl, and repeat with the remaining vegetables until they are all nice and brown, adding more oil as you need it.

Once all the vegetables are seared and removed from the pan, add the wine along with the sugar, herbs, a teaspoon of salt and a good grind of black pepper. Boil on a high heat for about three minutes.
Tip the lamb, vegetables and whole wheat back into the pot, and add the stock. Cover and boil for five minutes, then transfer to the oven for an hour and a half.
Remove the stew from the oven and check the liquid; if there is a lot, remove the lid and boil for a few minutes.

title: Lamb tomato and sweet spices

ingredients.name: small peeled and coarsely grated potatoes

instructions: Use pickled vine leaves here, preserved in brine. Small delicate leaves are better than the large bristly ones but, if only large leaves are to hand, then trim them to roughly 12 by 12 cms so that you don't get too many layers of leaves around the filling. And remove any stalks. Drain the preserved leaves, immerse them in boiling water for 10 minutes and then leave to dry on a tea towel before use.
Basmati rice with butter and pine nuts is an ideal accompaniment. Couscous is great, too. Serves four.

First make the filling. Put all the ingredients, apart from the tomatoes, in a bowl. Cut the tomatoes in half, coarsely grate into the bowl and discard the skins. Add half a teaspoon of salt and some black pepper, and stir. Leave on the side, or in the fridge, for up to a day. Before using, gently squeeze with your hands and drain away any juices that come out.

To make the sauce, heat the oil in a medium pan. Add the ginger and garlic, cook for a minute or two, taking care not to burn them, then add the tomato, lemon juice and sugar. Season, and simmer for 20 minutes.

While the sauce is bubbling away, prepare the vine leaves. Use any torn or broken leaves to line the base of a wide, heavy saucepan. Trim any leaves from the fennel, cut it vertically into 0.5cm-thick slices and spread over the base of the pan to cover completely.

Lay a prepared vine leaf (see intro) on a work surface, veiny side up. Put two teaspoons of filling at the base of the leaf in a 2cm-long by 1cm-wide strip. Fold the sides of the leaf over the filling, then roll it tightly from bottom to top, in a cigar shape. Place in the pan, seam down, and repeat with the remaining leaves, placing them tightly next to each other in lines or circles (in two layers if necessary).

Pour the sauce over the leaves (and, if needed, add water just to cover). Place a plate on top, to weigh the leaves down, then cover with a lid. Bring to a boil, reduce the heat and cook on a bare simmer for 70 minutes. Most of the liquid should evaporate. Remove from the heat, and leave to cool a little - they are best served warm. When serving, bring to the table in the pan - it looks great. Serve a few vine leaves and fennel slices with warm rice. Spoon the braising juices on top and garnish with coriander.

title: Rigatoni with fennel sausage sauce

ingredients.name: cut into 1.5cm-thick slices Italian fennel sausages
trimmed and roughly chopped; reserve any fronds to garnish fennel bulb
lightly toasted and then gently crushed fennel seeds
cut in half lengthways pitted black olives
rinsed and patted dry anchovy fillet

instructions: Heat a tablespoon of oil in a large saute pan for which you have a lid. Add the sausage pieces and fry on a medium-high heat for 10 minutes, stirring regularly, until golden-brown all over. Transfer the sausages to a plate, then add the onion and fennel to the hot pan and fry for 15 minutes, stirring once in a while, until soft and caramelised; if the pan goes a bit dry, add a teaspoon or so of extra oil. Stir in the paprika, garlic and half the fennel seeds, fry for two minutes more, then pour on the wine and boil for 30 seconds, to reduce by half. Add the tomatoes, sugar, 100ml water, the seared sausage and half a teaspoon of salt, cover and simmer for 30 minutes; remove the lid after 10 minutes, and cook until the sauce is thick and rich. Remove from the heat, stir through the olives and remaining fennel seeds and set aside until you’re ready to serve.

Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil, add the pasta and cook for 12-14 minutes (or according to the instructions on the packet), until al dente. Meanwhile, reheat the sauce. Drain the pasta, return it to the pot, stir in a tablespoon of oil, then divide between the bowls.

Put all the pesto ingredients except the basil in the small bowl of a food processor. Add a tablespoon of water and blitz to a rough paste. Add the basil, then blitz until just combined (the pesto has a much better texture if the basil is not overblended).
Spoon over the ragù and top with a spoonful of pesto. Finish with a sprinkling of chopped fennel fronds, if you have any, and serve at once.

title: Smoky Lentil Chili with Squash
instructions: Begin by roasting the squash. Slice it into thin crescents and drizzle with a little oil and sprinkle with sea salt. I added a fresh little sage I had in the fridge, but it’s unnecessary. Roast the squash a 205 C (400 F) for 20-30 minutes, flipping halfway through, until soft and golden. Let cool and chop into cubes.
Meanwhile, rinse the lentils and cover them with water. Bring them to the boil then turn down to a simmer and let cook (uncovered) for 20-30 minutes, or until tender. Drain and set aside.

While the lentils are cooking heat the 1 Tbsp. of oil on low in a medium pot. Add the onions and leeks and sauté for 5 or so minutes, or until they begin to soften. Add the garlic next along with the cumin and coriander, cooking for a few more minutes. Add the remaining spices – paprika, cinnamon, chilli, cocoa, Worcestershire sauce, salt, and oregano. Next add the can of tomatoes, the water or stock, and carrots. Let simmer, covered, for 20 minutes or until the veg is tender and the mixture has thickened up. You’ll need to check on the pot periodically for a stir and a top of of liquid if needed.
Add the lentils and chopped roasted squash. Let cook for 10 more minutes to heat through.
Serve with sliced jalapeno, lime wedges, cilantro, green onions, and cashew sour cream.
SIMPLE CASHEW SOUR CREAM
1 Cup Raw Unsalted Cashews
Pinch Sea Salt
1 tsp. Apple Cider Vinegar
Water

Bring some water to the boil, and use it to soak the cashews for at least four hours. Alternatively, you can use cold water and let the cashews soak overnight, but I’m forgetful/lazy, so often use the boil method which is much faster.

After the cashews have soaked, drain them and add to a high speed blender. Begin to puree, slowly adding about 1/2 cup fresh water, until a creamy consistency is reached. You may need to add less or more water to reach the desired consistency.
Add a pinch of sea salt and vinegar (or lemon juice).

title: Dal fry
instructions: Wash and soak toor dal in approx. 3 cups of water, for at least one hours. Dal will be double in volume after soaking. Drain the water.
Cook dal with 2-1/2 cups water and add salt, turmeric, on medium high heat, until soft in texture (approximately 30 mins) it should be like thick soup.
In a frying pan, heat the ghee. Add cumin seeds, and mustard seeds. After the seeds crack, add bay leaves, green chili, ginger and chili powder. Stir for a few seconds.
Add tomatoes, salt and sugar stir and cook until tomatoes are tender and mushy.
Add cilantro and garam masala cook for about one minute.
Pour the seasoning over dal mix it well and cook for another minute.
Serve with Naan.

title: Rocky Road Fudge
instructions: Line an 8-inch-square baking pan with wax paper or foil, and coat with non-stick spray.
Pour ½ cup of the miniature marshmallows into the bottom of the lined baking dish.
In a microwave-safe bowl, combine the chocolate chips and peanut butter. Microwave the chocolate mixture in 20-second intervals, stirring in between each interval, until the chocolate is melted.
Add the vanilla extract and stir well, until smooth.
Reserve 2 tablespoons of the chopped almonds or peanuts, and set aside.
Fold 1 ½ cups of the miniature marshmallows and the remaining chopped nuts into the chocolate mixture.
Transfer the chocolate mixture into the prepared pan and spread into an even layer. Immediately top with the reserved chopped nuts and the mallow bits or additional miniature marshmallows, if using.
Refrigerate for 4 hours, or until set.
Remove the fudge and wax paper from the pan. Carefully peel all of wax paper from the fudge.
Cut the fudge into bite-sized pieces and serve.

title: Hot Chocolate Fudge
instructions: Line an 8-inch-square baking pan with wax paper or foil, and coat with non-stick spray.

In a microwave-safe bowl, combine the dark chocolate chips, heavy cream and half of the sweetened condensed milk. Microwave the dark chocolate mixture in 20-second intervals, stirring in between each interval, until the chocolate is melted.
Add the vanilla extract to the dark chocolate mixture and stir well until smooth.
Transfer the dark chocolate mixture into the prepared pan and spread into an even layer.

In a separate bowl, combine the white chocolate chips with the remaining half of the sweetened condensed milk. Microwave the white chocolate mixture in 20-second intervals, stirring in between each interval, until the chocolate is melted.
Evenly spread the white chocolate mixture on top of dark chocolate layer.
Top the chocolate layers with the Mallow Bits or miniature marshmallows, and gently press them down.
Refrigerate for 4 hours, or until set.
Remove the fudge and wax paper from the pan. Carefully peel all of the wax paper from the fudge.
Cut the fudge into bite-sized pieces and serve.

title: Christmas Pudding Flapjack
instructions: Preheat the oven to 180°C/fan 160°C/gas mark 4 and grease and line a 25cm x 20cm tin. Melt the butter, sugar, syrup and orange zest in a large saucepan over a medium heat. The aim is to dissolve all the ingredients so that they are smooth, but to not lose any volume through boiling so be careful not to overheat.

Add the oats and stir well until evenly coated. Stir through the leftover Christmas pudding and tip into the prepared tin. Use a spoon to flatten the top and bake for 40 minutes until the edges start to brown. Whilst still warm in the tin, score into 12 squares. Allow to cool completely before cutting along the scores.
Keeps for 5 days in an air tight tin or freeze for up to 1 month.

title: Eton Mess
instructions: Purée half the strawberries in a blender. Chop the remaining strawberries, reserving four for decoration.
Whip the double cream until stiff peaks form, then fold in the strawberry purée and crushed meringue. Fold in the chopped strawberries and ginger cordial, if using.
Spoon equal amounts of the mixture into four cold wine glasses. Serve garnished with the remaining strawberries and a sprig of mint.

title: Bread and Butter Pudding
instructions: Grease a 1 litre/2 pint pie dish with butter.
Cut the crusts off the bread. Spread each slice with on one side with butter, then cut into triangles.

Arrange a layer of bread, buttered-side up, in the bottom of the dish, then add a layer of sultanas. Sprinkle with a little cinnamon, then repeat the layers of bread and sultanas, sprinkling with cinnamon, until you have used up all of the bread. Finish with a layer of bread, then set aside.
Gently warm the milk and cream in a pan over a low heat to scalding point. Don't let it boil.
Crack the eggs into a bowl, add three quarters of the sugar and lightly whisk until pale.
Add the warm milk and cream mixture and stir well, then strain the custard into a bowl.
Pour the custard over the prepared bread layers and sprinkle with nutmeg and the remaining sugar and leave to stand for 30 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 180C/355F/Gas 4.
Place the dish into the oven and bake for 30-40 minutes, or until the custard has set and the top is golden-brown.

title: Sticky Toffee Pudding Ultimate
instructions: Stone and chop the dates quite small, put them in a bowl, then pour the boiling water over. Leave for about 30 mins until cool and well-soaked, then mash a bit with a fork. Stir in the vanilla extract. Butter and flour seven mini pudding tins (each about 200ml/7fl oz) and sit them on a baking sheet. Heat oven to 180C/fan 160C/gas 4.

While the dates are soaking, make the puddings. Mix the flour and bicarbonate of soda together and beat the eggs in a separate bowl. Beat the butter and sugar together in a large bowl for a few mins until slightly creamy (the mixture will be grainy from the sugar). Add the eggs a little at a time, beating well between additions. Beat in the black treacle then, using a large metal spoon, gently fold in one-third of the flour, then half the milk, being careful not to overbeat. Repeat until all the flour and milk is used. Stir the soaked dates into the pudding batter. The mix may look a little curdled at this point and will be like a soft, thick batter. Spoon it evenly between the tins and bake for 20-25 mins, until risen and firm.

Meanwhile, put the sugar and butter for the sauce in a medium saucepan with half the cream. Bring to the boil over a medium heat, stirring all the time, until the sugar has completely dissolved. Stir in the black treacle, turn up the heat slightly and let the mixture bubble away for 2-3 mins until it is a rich toffee colour, stirring occasionally to make sure it doesn’t burn. Take the pan off the heat and beat in the rest of the cream.

Remove the puddings from the oven. Leave in the tins for a few mins, then loosen them well from the sides of the tins with a small palette knife before turning them out. You can serve them now with the sauce drizzled over, but they’ll be even stickier if left for a day or two coated in the sauce. To do this, pour about half the sauce into one or two ovenproof serving dishes. Sit the upturned puddings on the sauce, then pour the rest of the sauce over them. Cover with a loose tent of foil so that the sauce doesn’t smudge (no need to chill).
When ready to serve, heat oven to 180C/fan 160C/gas 4. Warm the puddings through, still covered, for 15-20 mins or until the sauce is bubbling. Serve them on their own, or with cream or custard.

title: Vegan Chocolate Cake
instructions: Simply mix all dry ingredients with wet ingredients and blend altogether. Bake for 45 min on 180 degrees. Decorate with some melted vegan chocolate

title: Chicken Handi
instructions: Take a large pot or wok, big enough to cook all the chicken, and heat the oil in it. Once the oil is hot, add sliced onion and fry them until deep golden brown. Then take them out on a plate and set aside.
To the same pot, add the chopped garlic and sauté for a minute. Then add the chopped tomatoes and cook until tomatoes turn soft. This would take about 5 minutes.
Then return the fried onion to the pot and stir. Add ginger paste and sauté well.
Now add the cumin seeds, half of the coriander seeds and chopped green chillies. Give them a quick stir.
Next goes in the spices – turmeric powder and red chilli powder. Sauté the spices well for couple of minutes.

Add the chicken pieces to the wok, season it with salt to taste and cook the chicken covered on medium-low heat until the chicken is almost cooked through. This would take about 15 minutes. Slowly sautéing the chicken will enhance the flavor, so do not expedite this step by putting it on high heat.

When the oil separates from the spices, add the beaten yogurt keeping the heat on lowest so that the yogurt doesn’t split. Sprinkle the remaining coriander seeds and add half of the dried fenugreek leaves. Mix well.
Finally add the cream and give a final mix to combine everything well.
Sprinkle the remaining kasuri methi and garam masala and serve the chicken handi hot with naan or rotis. Enjoy!

title: Chicken Alfredo Primavera
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of butter and 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Season both sides of each chicken breast with seasoned salt and a pinch of pepper. Add the chicken to the skillet and cook for 5-7 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.  While the chicken is cooking, bring a large pot of water to a boil. Season the boiling water with a few generous pinches of kosher salt. Add the pasta and give it a stir. Cook, stirring occasionally, until al dente, about 12 minutes. Reserve 1/2 cup of  pasta water before draining the pasta.  Remove the chicken from the pan and transfer it to a cutting board; allow it to rest. Turn the heat down to medium and dd the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter and olive oil to the same pan you used to cook the chicken. Add the veggies (minus the garlic) and red pepper flakes to the pan and stir to coat with the oil and butter (refrain from seasoning with salt until the veggies are finished browning). Cook, stirring often, until the veggies are tender, about 5 minutes. Add the garlic and a generous pinch of salt and pepper to the pan and cook for 1 minute.  Deglaze the pan with the white wine. Continue to cook until the wine has reduced by half, about 3 minutes. Stir in the milk, heavy cream, and reserved pasta water. Bring the mixture to a gentle boil and allow to simmer and reduce for 2-3 minutes. Turn off the heat and add the Parmesan cheese and cooked pasta. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Garnish with Parmesan cheese and chopped parsley, if desired.

title: Spicy North African Potato Salad
instructions: Cook potatoes - place potatoes in a pot of cold water, and bring to the boil. Boil 20 minutes, or until potatoes are tender. You know they are cooked when you can stick a knife in them and the knife goes straight through.
Combine harissa spice, olive oil, salt and pepper and lemon juice in a small bowl and whisk until combined.
Once potatoes are cooked, drain water and roughly chop potatoes in half.
Add harissa mix and spring onions/green onions to potatoes and stir.
In a large salad bowl, lay out arugula/rocket.
Top with potato mix and toss.
Add fetta, mint and sprinkle over pine nuts.
Adjust salt and pepper to taste.

title: Fish pie
instructions: 01.Put the potatoes in a large pan of cold salted water and bring to the boil. Lower the heat, cover, then simmer gently for 15 minutes until tender. Drain, then return to the pan over a low heat for 30 seconds to drive off any excess water. Mash with 1 tbsp olive oil, then season.

02.Meanwhile put the milk in a large sauté pan, add the fish and bring to the boil. Remove from the heat, cover and stand for 3 minutes. Remove the fish (reserving the milk) and pat dry with kitchen paper, then gently flake into an ovenproof dish, discarding the skin and any bones.

03.Heat the remaining oil in a pan, stir in the flour and cook for 30 seconds. Gradually stir in 200-250ml of the reserved milk (discard the rest). Grate in nutmeg, season, then bubble until thick. Stir in the cream.

04.Preheat the oven to 190°C/fan170°C/gas 5. Grate the artichokes and add to the dish with the leek, prawns and herbs. Stir the lemon zest and juice into the sauce, then pour over. Mix gently with a wooden spoon.

05.Spoon the mash onto the fish mixture, then use a fork to make peaks, which will crisp and brown as it cooks. Sprinkle over the cheese, then bake for 35-40 minutes until golden and bubbling. Serve with wilted greens.

title: Beef Wellington
instructions: Put the mushrooms into a food processor with some seasoning and pulse to a rough paste. Scrape the paste into a pan and cook over a high heat for about 10 mins, tossing frequently, to cook out the moisture from the mushrooms. Spread out on a plate to cool.

Heat in a frying pan and add a little olive oil. Season the beef and sear in the hot pan for 30 secs only on each side. (You don't want to cook it at this stage, just colour it). Remove the beef from the pan and leave to cool, then brush all over with the mustard.

Lay a sheet of cling film on a work surface and arrange the Parma ham slices on it, in slightly overlapping rows. With a palette knife, spread the mushroom paste over the ham, then place the seared beef fillet in the middle. Keeping a tight hold of the cling film from the edge, neatly roll the Parma ham and mushrooms around the beef to form a tight barrel shape. Twist the ends of the cling film to secure. Chill for 15-20 mins to allow the beef to set and keep its shape.

Roll out the puff pastry on a floured surface to a large rectangle, the thickness of a £1 coin. Remove the cling film from the beef, then lay in the centre. Brush the surrounding pastry with egg yolk. Fold the ends over, the wrap the pastry around the beef, cutting off any excess. Turn over, so the seam is underneath, and place on a baking sheet. Brush over all the pastry with egg and chill for about 15 mins to let the pastry rest.
Heat the oven to 200C, 400F, gas 6.

Lightly score the pastry at 1cm intervals and glaze again with beaten egg yolk. Bake for 20 minutes, then lower the oven setting to 180C, 350F, gas 4 and cook for another 15 mins. Allow to rest for 10-15 mins before slicing and serving with the side dishes of your choice. The beef should still be pink in the centre when you serve it.

title: Poutine
instructions: Heat oil in a deep fryer or deep heavy skillet to 365°F (185°C).
Warm gravy in saucepan or microwave.
Place the fries into the hot oil, and cook until light brown, about 5 minutes.
Remove to a paper towel lined plate to drain.
Place the fries on a serving platter, and sprinkle the cheese over them.
Ladle gravy over the fries and cheese, and serve immediately.

title: Lamb Biryani

ingredients.name: ½ tsp dissolved in ½ cup warm milk Saffron

instructions: Grind the cashew, poppy seeds and cumin seeds into a smooth paste, using as little water as possible. Set aside.

Deep fry the sliced onions when it is hot. Don’t overcrowd the oil. When the onions turn light brown, remove from oil and drain on paper towel. The fried onion will crisp up as it drains. Also fry the cashewnuts till golden brown. Set aside.
Wash the rice and soak in water for twenty minutes.
Meanwhile, take a big wide pan, add oil in medium heat, add the sliced onions, add the blended paste, to it add the green chillies, ginger garlic paste and garlic and fry for a minute.
Then add the tomatoes and sauté them well till they are cooked and not mushy.
Then to it add the red chilli powder, biryani powder, mint, coriander leaves and sauté them well.
Add the yogurt and mix well. I always move the skillet away from the heat when adding yogurt which prevents it from curdling.

Now after returning the skillet back to the stove, add the washed lamb and salt and ½ cup water and mix well. Cook for 1 hour and cook it covered in medium low heat or put it in a pressure cooker for 6 whistles. If the water is not drained totally, heat it by keeping it open.

Take another big pan, add thrice the cup of rice you use, and boil it. When it is boiling high, add the rice, salt and jeera and mix well. After 7 minutes exact or when the rice is 80% done. Switch off and drain the rice.
Now, the layering starts. To the lamb, pat and level it. Add the drained hot rice on the top of it. Garnish with fried onions, ghee, mint, coriander leaves and saffron dissolved in milk.

Cover the dish and bake in a 350f oven for 15 minutes or till the cooked but not mushy. Or cook in the stove medium heat for 12 minutes and lowest heat for 5 minutes. And switch off. Mix and serve hot!
Notes
1. If you are cooking in oven, do make sure to cook in a big oven safe pan and cover it tight and then keep in oven for the final step.
